steps.expected: History page displayed with audit entries and Rerun buttons
steps.observed: History page displayed with 23 audits, each with a Rerun button

steps.action: Click first Rerun button (for nonexistent-domain-test-12345.invalid audit)
steps.expected: New audit created with same target_url and scenarios, navigation to run page
steps.observed: Navigated to /audits/f0039a28-41fa-455b-a666-8ba4f144e980/run showing same URL (nonexistent-domain-test-12345.invalid) and Cookie Consent scenario

steps.action: Verify run page shows matching parameters
steps.expected: Run page shows same target URL and scenarios as original audit
steps.observed: Run page header shows https://nonexistent-domain-test-12345.invalid/ with Cookie Consent scenario, progress at 100%, Live Mode

evidence.network: POST /api/audits -> new audit created, navigated to /audits/{new-id}/run

steps.action: Navigate directly to compare page via URL with audit IDs
steps.expected: Comparison page showing trust score deltas and metric differences
steps.observed: Compare page displayed with Trust Score Delta (0), side-by-side Audit Comparison, Scenario Breakdown, Key Differences, and Audit Details sections

steps.action: Navigate to /history, select two audits using checkboxes
steps.observed: Compare button changed from 'Compare (0/2)' [disabled] to 'Compare (2/2)' [enabled] after selecting two checkboxes

steps.expected: Navigate to comparison page with selected audit IDs
Trust score deltas, finding count differences, key metric comparisons visible
steps.observed: Trust Score Delta: 0 points, Finding Count Change: 0 findings, Risk Level Comparison: low → low, Scenario Breakdown: Cookie Consent (0/0), Checkout Flow (0/0), Audit Details showing same URL and mode

steps.expected: Persona diff page showing side-by-side comparison of persona experiences
steps.observed: Page displayed with 'Compare Persona Experiences' header, Trust Score 26, badges: 3 Personas Compared, 3 Total Findings, 2 Differences Found

steps.action: Verify Key Differences section with highlighted differences
steps.observed: Two highlighted difference cards: PATH (orange) - 'Path length varies by 1 steps between personas', FRICTION (red) - 'Significant friction difference (1.0) between personas'. Both with colored borders and backgrounds.

steps.expected: Three persona columns showing different experiences
steps.observed: Three columns: Privacy Sensitive (1 Finding, 3 Avg Steps, Friction 300%), Cost Sensitive (1 Finding, 3 Avg Steps, Friction 300%), Exit Intent (1 Finding, 4 Avg Steps, Friction 400%). Each with observed paths, UI scrapes, and findings.
2 elements with diff/highlight/difference class names found in DOM

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. VAL-UI-004 (Rerun) creates a new audit with matching parameters and navigates to run page. VAL-UI-005 (Compare) supports both direct URL and checkbox selection flow, showing trust score deltas, finding counts, and key metric comparisons. VAL-UI-006 (Persona Diff) shows side-by-side comparison with highlighted PATH and FRICTION differences across 3 personas.
